name: Embed My Reviews
description:
Embed My Reviews is a white-label reputation management software that has just been launched and is fairly new to the industry. It offers simplified solutions for online reputation management for your clients and is specifically designed for agencies. 

Source: G2

Features:

➡️Pulls in reviews from top review sites, giving clients the option to handle and reply to reviews all in one spot.

➡️Customize branding with options like logos, favicons, and themes, plus use your own branded domain.

➡️Integrates third-party scripts seamlessly.

Benefits: 

✅Agency-focused and small-knit team 

✅Inter-personal and helpful customer support team

Cons: 

❌Lacks a lot of features 

❌Has a lot more to work on and develop more integrations 

❌Expensive for the features the platform has to offer

Priced at 99$ Per Month
what_people_say:
Likes:

“It has been designed for agencies so every single feature can be turned on or off for each individual customer. The flexibility and constant updates are the main reasons I like this platform so much. The support team is also amazing and is very good at communicating bugs, feature updates, and community posts. This is very rare in founders these days and I have full fate in their ability to create the best reputation management platform and help agencies utilize it. The founder's words and promise it will also soon be able to integrate easily with more review platforms than any other software.”

‍

Dislikes:

“The User Interface can be a little unintuitive but this is. Onstdly being updated and improved

It's still fairly new so some features are not added yet. But that is the con of being an early adopter so I'm confident all essential features will be added in the very near future. I honestly don't have anything else to add.”

*Review sourced and cited through G2*
